narrative:
Gallia County has 18,048 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.2% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -16.9% D−R vs -29.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
